portfolio_rationale: BRK.B and AAPL lead with the cleanest bull cases — both have fully aligned technical setups (price above all MAs, MACD positive) and strong fundamentals with well-rebutted bear cases. LLY gets a smaller allocation due to extreme overbought conditions (RSI 81.6) and a mixed signal history despite exceptional fundamentals. AMZN and XOM receive minimal weight given neutral/mixed technicals and thinner fundamental support, while GOOGL is excluded on a neutral judge signal.

BRK.B.reason: Strongest technical setup with all MAs aligned bullishly, solid 60% operating margin and 48% net margin, and bear case relies on stale data now contradicted by current positive revenue growth.

AAPL.reason: Clean bull case with strong technicals (MACD positive, price above all MAs), exceptional margins and 22% revenue growth, and the liquidity concern is structurally normal for AAPL and well-rebutted.

LLY.reason: Outstanding fundamentals with 54% revenue growth and 83% gross margin, but extreme overbought RSI of 81.6 and a bearish signal just 3 weeks ago warrant a reduced position.

AMZN.reason: Strong fundamental metrics but recurring weakening momentum (price below 20-day MA, MACD below signal) and neutral technical signal limit conviction.

XOM.reason: Consistent bullish judge signal over 3 weeks and positive news sentiment, but thin fundamental disclosure and mixed technicals with negative 5-day momentum cap the allocation.

GOOGL.reason: Judge returned a neutral signal at 0.5 confidence — bull and bear cases too balanced to justify a directional position.
